status_notes: Initial entry for STRIDE threat modeling methodology. Reviewed 2026-04-05.

match_nodes.description: STRIDE: threat modeling methodology categorizing threats into six categories — Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Information Disclosure, Denial of Service, Elevation of Privilege. Originally developed at Microsoft by Loren Kohnfelder and Praerit Garg. Widely adopted as a standard approach to systematic threat enumeration.
